title: ICUBE-Q Lunar Mission
shortDescription: Pakistan's lunar CubeSat mission integrated with Chang'e-6. Served as one of three Principal Investigators and contributed to mission-oriented program execution, payload integration, and national visibility in lunar small-satellite capability.
description: ICUBE-Q is Pakistan's inaugural lunar CubeSat mission, launched aboard China's Chang'e-6 lunar probe. The mission advances lunar science, demonstrates small satellite capabilities for deep space, and builds national capacity in space systems engineering. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as one of three Principal Investigators, leading payload development, integration, and mission operations.
partners: China National Space Administration, Chang'e-6 mission

sections.title: Mission Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-Q is Pakistan's inaugural lunar CubeSat mission, launched aboard China's Chang'e-6 lunar probe. As one of three Principal Investigators, Dr. Rehan Mahmood led payload development, integration, and mission operations. The mission advances lunar science, demonstrates small satellite capabilities for deep space, and builds national capacity in space systems engineering.

title: SSS-2A
shortDescription: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A developed with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Pakistan-side technical leadership for engineering, integration, and validation.
description: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A. Developed in collaboration with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as technical lead from the Pakistan side.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: SSS-2A is APSCO's Student Small Satellite-2A, developed collaboratively with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. As technical lead from the Pakistan side, Dr. Rehan Mahmood coordinated engineering, integration, and validation. The program advances student satellite capabilities across the APSCO region and strengthens international collaboration in small satellite development.

title: ICUBE-N
shortDescription: Pakistan's National CubeSat program. Overview and preliminary subsystem design advancing small satellite capabilities and institutional capacity.
description: National CubeSat initiative advancing small satellite capabilities and building institutional capacity.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-N is Pakistan's National CubeSat program. The project advances small satellite capabilities through preliminary subsystem design and builds institutional capacity in space systems engineering.

title: ICUBE-1
shortDescription: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Subsystem analysis, software, and payload work establishing foundational credibility for subsequent ICUBE missions.
description: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Educational program for hands-on space systems training and technology demonstration.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-1 was Pakistan's first university CubeSat, providing hands-on training in CubeSat design, development, and operations. Subsystem analysis, software, and payload work established foundational credibility for subsequent ICUBE missions.

title: NGN/NTN–PPDR Simulator
shortDescription: Current work on a digital-twin and scenario-evaluation platform for resilient communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks, with operator-facing KPI workflows, mock interfaces, and future policy-evaluation extensions.
description: NGN/NTN–PPDR digital twin for scenario evaluation, resilient communications, terrestrial and non-terrestrial integration, and KPI analytics. Operator-facing simulator for public protection and disaster relief, with visual mock interfaces and policy-simulation direction.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The NGN/NTN–PPDR simulator is a digital-twin and scenario-evaluation platform for resilient communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks. It supports operator-facing KPI workflows, mock interfaces for telecom-space and PPDR decision support, and future policy-evaluation extensions.

title: KidSat
shortDescription: Educational satellite program for youth engagement.
description: Educational satellite program for youth engagement in space technology and STEM outreach.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: KidSat engages young students in satellite technology and space science through hands-on educational activities.

title: ICUBE-CSAT
description: CubeSat in the ICUBE program series.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-CSAT contributes to the broader ICUBE program objectives.
